spec.reasoning: Lexical perturbation: Renamed 'Product' to 'Item' and 'Unique ID (Expected Result)' to 'Serial No (Expected Result)', and renamed the sheet from 'Sheet1' to 'ProductData'. The instruction references 'products' as a general English concept (not as a column reference), and refers to columns by letter (Column A, Column B), so renaming the header won't conflict with instruction wording. Positional title row insert: Added a title row to shift headers from row 1 to row 2, which tests whether the model hardcodes row positions. The answer position shifts from B2:B43 to B3:B44. Distractor column: Added 'Category' as a plausible but irrelevant column to test if the model gets confused by extra columns.
